description:STRING: 'The classic office world represents an interior environment that contains two rooms
previewGIF:STRING: a lobby and a conference room. Both rooms are designed as a ready-to-use environment and have entry-point objects (these move avatars to their original spots upon entering the rooms).  The lobby  includes a logo object that links to a welcome notice using the HTML web page object.  You can change the URL that the logo links to
column5: and the placement of the HTML notice by right-clicking it
column6: selecting Properties and then clicking Web Page.

description:STRING: 'The high-tech office world represents an interior environment that contains two rooms
previewGIF:STRING: a lobby and a conference room.  Both rooms have views of an urban cityscape in the evening.  It is designed as a ready-to-use environment and has entry-point objects (these move avatars to their original spots upon entering a room).  In the lobby
gifInfo:STRING: there is a logo object that links to a welcome notice using the HTML web page object. You can change the URL that the logo links to
column6: and the placement of the HTML notice by right-clicking it
